name: The Arcane Halls
description: Journey through the mystical realm of Magitech — from fractured wards to the ultimate ascension ritual.

tiers.name: Rune Binding Basics
tiers.description: Learn the fundamentals of rune resonance, mana channeling, and arcane fault exploitation.

tiers.name: The Arcane Rebellion
tiers.description: Deeper arcane systems — recursive spells, dependency trees, and multi-path exploits.

tiers.name: The Ascension Crisis
tiers.description: Boss-tier arcane challenges. Face the Lich Archon and halt the cataclysm.
